steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage says “The Crown of Columbus” is set largely on a Caribbean island, outside Ojibwe communities.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Choice B states it isn’t set in a rural Ojibwe community, which directly matches the Caribbean island setting described. The other three either add information not in the passage (A, C) or claim something not supported (D). That matches choice B — B is correct.
